title: ILOAT Judgment No. 914 — International Telecommunication Union (ITU)
text:
Registry's translation, the French 
text alone being authoritative.
SIXTY-FOURTH SESSION
In re DUBRET (No. 2)
Judgment 914
THE ADMINISTRATIVE TRIBUNAL,
Considering the second complaint filed by Mr. Fernand Dubret against the International Telecommunication Union
(ITU) on 4 August 1987 and the Union's reply of 9 December 1987;
Considering that by a letter of 17 February 1988 the complainant informed the President of the Tribunal that he
wished to withdraw suit;
Considering that by a letter of 2 March 1988 the Union informed the Registrar that it had no objection to the
withdrawal of suit;
Considering that suit is unreservedly withdrawn;
DECISION:
The withdrawal of suit is hereby recorded.In witness of this judgment by Mr. Jacques Ducoux, President of the
Tribunal, Tun Mohamed Suffian, Vice-President, and Miss Mella Carroll, Judge, the aforementioned have signed
hereunder, as have I, Allan Gardner, Registrar.
Delivered in public sitting in Geneva on 30 June 1988.
(Signed)
Jacques Ducoux 
Mohamed Suffian 
Mella Carroll 
A.B. Gardner
Updated by PFR. Approved by CC. Last update: 7 July 2000.
decision:
The withdrawal of suit is hereby recorded.
